seasonality: DOGE price and on-chain activity are event-driven, spiking around Elon Musk social-media posts, meme cycles, and exchange listing announcements rather than following a consistent calendar pattern.
rationale: Dogecoin is a proof-of-work Layer-1 payments chain with no smart-contract platform, no TVL, no protocol fee switch, and no staking yield; miners receive block rewards (currently 10,000 DOGE per block, ~1 minute blocks, ~5.256 billion DOGE emitted per year at ~$0.16 = ~$840 M annualized issuance) but this is miner revenue/inflation, not 'protocol revenue' in the DeFi sense. DefiLlama does not list DOGE under its fees/revenue dashboard, Token Terminal free tier does not cover DOGE, and there is no fee-accrual mechanism to token holders, making P/S, P/TVL, real yield, and TVL metrics structurally inapplicable. Peer chains LTC and BCH share the same architecture and are equally untrackable via DeFi-native revenue metrics.
